taxonomy.description: a required source artifact is absent on disk
a required eval is missing or has not produced evidence
a trace or observability record is missing
replay integrity has not been confirmed for this system
a policy or trust-decision artifact is missing or inconsistent
an artifact loaded but its generated_at is older than the dashboard freshness threshold (or missing/unparseable/future)
a system_id or graph node is not present in the system registry
a producing script or API route reported an internal error
no signal evidence available; root cause is explicitly unknown
no failure detected on the candidate system

explain_panel_separation.root_cause_reason: human-readable reason recorded on the root node — not a signal list
explain_panel_separation.missing_signals: failing signals collected across the entire failure path; never asserted as the root cause
explain_panel_separation.downstream_impact: registry systems on the failure path other than the root cause
explain_panel_separation.taxonomy: single canonical taxonomy code derived from root-cause signals
explain_panel_separation.confidence: artifact_backed=true|false; false when no node-level evidence exists

ui_state_mapping.rationale: blocked_signal usually traces to missing control / enforcement input
freeze_signal often follows a schema or invariant break
node has no source artifact backing it
node only has a stub fallback; treat as missing
stale artifact often precedes missing eval coverage
explicit unknown when no signal evidence is present
